infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Required to photograph the meter dial when capturing a reading.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Required to record the GPS coordinates of the meter reading location.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Required to record GPS coordinates when capturing readings in the field.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Water Meter App to access your camera to capture meter photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Water Meter App to record your location when capturing meter readings.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Water Meter App to access photos.
